sections.biography-sanguo-yanyi: E Huan was tall and known to be of a savage nature. He wielded a two-bladed halberd. He was famous among the Nanman army for his courage and prowess on the battlefield. He fought against Wei Yan, during Zhuge Liang’s southern campaign, and was led into a trap. Zhuge Liang released him after capture, in order to entice Gao Ding to surrender.

full_text:
E Huan 鄂煥
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
E Huan (鄂煥). General under Gao Ding. Captured by Shu forces. E Huan is a fictional character. E Huan was affiliated with Nanman and the Shu Kingdom.

Romance of the Three Kingdoms:87
BiographySanguo Yanyi
EHuan was tall and known to be of a savage nature. He wielded a two-bladed halberd. He was famous among the Nanman army for his courage and prowess on the battlefield. He fought against Wei Yan, during Zhuge Liang’s southern campaign, and was led into a trap. Zhuge Liang released him after capture, in order to entice Gao Ding to surrender.
